summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Pinoy General Insurance homepage. All required features working correctly including responsive design, mobile hamburger menu, sticky header, and all CTA button functionality.
passed_tests: Header renders with logo, navigation links, and Get Quote button
Header sticky behavior with backdrop blur and shadow effects
Mobile hamburger menu toggles navigation properly
Hero section displays correct headline and buttons
Best of Business section shows awards badges and stats (2000+ Clients, 30+ Years)
Services section shows all 4 service cards with Get Quote buttons
Google Reviews section shows testimonials with 5 stars each
Google logo visible in reviews headline
Leave Us a Review gold CTA button present and styled correctly
Contact section with functional form and correct contact info
All Get Quote buttons link to #contact section
Button click functionality works on mobile and desktop
